ul.li: Alignment Strategy: While VMOVUPS (Unaligned) is used, peak throughput requires 32-byte alignment to ensure VMOVAPS compatibility and avoid cache-line split penalties (-20% throughput).
Safety Contract: AVX2 functions are marked unsafe. Execution must be gated by is_x86_feature_detected or cpuid bitmask checks to prevent SIGILL.

Intrinsic Usage:
_mm256_loadu_ps: Load 256-bit vector
_mm256_fmadd_ps: Fused Multiply-Add (requires FMA3 support)

Cost Profile:
Dispatch overhead: ~8-12 cycles.
AVX2 inner loop: 1 vector per 0.5 cycles (pipelined).

g.text: Intel x86_64 Runtime SIMD Dispatch: M2 Technical Design
Classification: Technical / Low-Level Design | Latency: O(1) Dispatch | Size: ~64 Bytes Call Frame

g.title: Critical check for 32-byte boundary (YMM register width)
Critical check for 32-byte boundary (YMM register width)
